sentences.english: I can meet someone and forget their name five seconds later.
I use tricks to remember names, like repeating them right away.
Like 'Nice to meet you, John' — it really helps.
sentences.korean: 바로 반복하는 거예요. '만나서 반갑습니다 존' 같이요 — 정말 도움이 돼요.

sentences.english: I remember faces perfectly, but names just disappear from my brain.
sentences.korean: 얼굴은 완벽히 기억하지만 이름은 머릿속에서 사라져요.

sentences.english: It's so embarrassing when you have to ask again.
sentences.korean: 다시 물어봐야 할 때 너무 창피해요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
